title: Profesión: Detective
overview: Alex Caballero is a private detective by correspondence. An interesting case of adultery and blackmail appears, which could make the business quick off. The investigation starts and it gets complicated until it lands in a shady presidential campaign, discovering an election fraud and crimes comitted by a politician connected to drug trafficking in order to win.

trailers.title: Re-Release Trailer
trailers.channel_name: Festival de Cine de Lima PUCP
